title: liatris squarrosa var. alabemensis
intro: Liatris squarrosa var. alabemensis, commonly known as Alabamian Blazing Star or Purple Blazing Star, is a flowering plant species within the Liatris genus. It is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States, characterized by its purple flowers and square stems. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, derived from its root and flowers. The health benefits of Liatris squarrosa var. alabemensis include its use as a treatment for colds, sore throats, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for topical application.
